completed.title: aios-evidence — retention-class compaction worker per S3.1 §11.5 / §12 / §13 (M2 CLOSER)

Total variants 428 (Wave 13 dense 1..=427 + Wave 14+ reserved 1). aios-evidence Cargo.toml 0.0.1 → 0.1.0 (M2 closure marker). cargo build/test/clippy/fmt all PASS. completed.title: aios-policy — policy bundle loader (S2.3 §12, signed + version-pinned)
completed.evidence: 479 tests workspace (+15 new in tests/bundle.rs). New crates/aios-policy/src/bundle.rs: PolicyBundle envelope per S2.3 §12 (bundle_version polb_<hex>, bundle_id, created_at RFC3339, signing_authority trust-store key, signature_ed25519 64-byte base64 STANDARD on wire, rules: Vec<PolicyRule>); PolicyRule per §11.2 (rule_id, scope, effect, priority, subjects[], actions[], conditions[] AND-joined per §9.1, optional constraints + approval, reason_code); RuleEffect closed enum {Unspecified (rejected), Allow, Deny}; RuleScope closed enum {Global, PerSubjectType, PerActionTarget, PerSubject, PerAction}; SignedBundleBody view (omits signature) is the exact byte input to Ed25519 sign+verify per §12.3; canonical_signed_body_bytes() returns serde_json deterministic order. New crates/aios-policy/src/bundle_loader.rs: BundleLoader struct (trusted_authorities HashMap<String, VerifyingKey> + Option<expected_bundle_version>); load_from_bytes does 5 ordered checks (JSON parse → version pin → authority lookup → Ed25519 verify → per-rule conditions_parser::parse + RuleEffect::Unspecified rejection); load_from_file delegates via std::fs::read. PolicyError +4 variants: InvalidPolicyBundle(String) (rule <id> condition: <err>), BundleSignatureInvalid, BundleVersionMismatch{expected,found}, BundleUnknownAuthority(String). Dep additions: ed25519-dalek 2.1 + blake3 (workspace) + base64 0.22 (new workspace dep) + rand_core 0.6 dev-dep — Cargo.toml aios-policy only; workspace Cargo.toml gains base64 entry. lib.rs re-exports PolicyBundle, PolicyRule, RuleEffect, RuleScope, BundleLoader. Tests cover: happy round-trip, malformed JSON, per-rule condition parse failure, perturbed-body bad signature, unknown authority, version pin mismatch + match, empty rules valid, determinism (parse-twice byte-equal), positive signature material round-trip, RuleScope serde for all 5 variants, 50-rule scale smoke, PolicyError canonical Display strings, RuleEffect::Unspecified rejection, load_from_file. cargo check/test/clippy --all-targets -D warnings/fmt --check all PASS. Scope guard: hard_deny_engine.rs / kernel.rs / pipeline.rs / conditions*.rs / constraints.rs / hard_deny.rs / subject.rs / decision.rs UNTOUCHED. Spec deviation reported: brief asked for single condition string per rule + closed scope enum; S2.3 §11.2 is conditions[] list (multiple ANDed per §9.1) + bundles populate §5 tiers 4 & 5 — TRUST SPEC applied (rule keeps conditions: Vec<String>) and scope kept as orthogonal routing-hint enum.

completed.title: aios-policy — subject hydration + AI self-approval prevention (S2.3 §7 + §17)
completed.evidence: 498 tests workspace (+19 over T-022 baseline 479). New crates/aios-policy/src/subject_hydration.rs (~300 LoC, 3 inline unit tests). SubjectHydrator async trait + InMemoryHydrator HashMap-backed impl + HydratedRecord {subject, valid_until, revoked} + InMemoryHydrator::with_fixtures() pre-loading 4 canonical subjects (human:lucky, agent:dev, application:planner, service:systemd). Unknown / revoked / expired records collapse to PolicyError::SubjectUnauthenticated per §7. Blanket impl for Arc<T: SubjectHydrator + ?Sized + Send + Sync>. Pipeline step 2 wired via new DecisionPipeline::evaluate_with_chain which accepts (envelope, original_context, hydrated_context: Option<&PolicyContext>, engine: Option<&HardDenyEngine>); hydrated_context = None signals SubjectUnauthenticated short-circuit emitting Decision::Deny + reason_code=SubjectUnauthenticated. Kernel InMemoryPolicyKernel +2 ctors: new_with_full_chain(hydrator, engine) and new_with_subject_hydrator(hydrator). Kernel evaluate_policy now awaits hydrator.hydrate(subject_canonical_id) outside the (sync) pipeline driver and passes the resolved (Option<PolicyContext>) in. Pipeline §17 evaluator landed as pure function evaluate_ai_self_approval_prevention(decision, subject, envelope) -> Option<ApprovalRequirement> + DecisionPipeline::apply_step_8(decision, subject, envelope) -> PolicyDecision that mints the upgrade. §17.1 risk-flag detection over envelope.request.target.risk.<flag> (destructive/privileged/network_exposure/secret_access/recovery_path_affected); §17.3 carve-out: all-flags-false AI subject keeps ALLOW. Upgrade preserves policy_decision_id + request_hash + bundle_version + enrichment_snapshot_id; mutates decision → RequireApproval, reason_code → AiSelfApprovalUpgrade, approval → {required:true, ExactRequestHash, ttl 300, approver_classes:[Human], require_human_co_signer:false}; rules_consulted bumps by 1. lib.rs re-exports: SubjectHydrator, InMemoryHydrator, HydratedRecord, evaluate_ai_self_approval_prevention. New tests/subject_hydration.rs (8 tests): fixtures provide 4 canonical subjects, hydration determinism, unknown id rejection, expired record rejection, dyn trait Arc<dyn SubjectHydrator + Send + Sync> usable, kernel end-to-end SubjectUnauthenticated short-circuit, kernel end-to-end hydration replaces placeholder (lands at DefaultDeny), backward-compat kernel without hydrator. New tests/ai_self_approval.rs (8 tests): AI + ALLOW + risk → REQUIRE_APPROVAL upgrade, human + risk → unchanged ALLOW, AI + DENY → unchanged DENY, §17.3 carve-out preserves ALLOW, upgrade carries approver_classes=[Human] + ExactRequestHash, pure evaluator invariant truth table, audit fields preserved across upgrade, application subject also triggers upgrade. cargo check/test (498)/clippy --all-targets -D warnings/fmt --check all PASS. Scope guard: hard_deny_engine.rs / hard_deny.rs / conditions*.rs / constraints.rs / decision.rs / subject.rs / error.rs UNTOUCHED. Pipeline step 2 + step 8 are the ONLY pipeline modifications. T-023 (gRPC), T-024 (cache), T-025 (override boundary + acceptance fixtures + v0.1.0 bump) deferred.

New conditions_parser.rs (~700 LoC) — hand-written recursive-descent (no pest/nom/combine per §21), pub fn parse(&str) -> Result<Condition, ConditionParseError>; 9-variant error enum all carrying 1-based (line, column); time.recovery_mode bare boolean sugar per §9.1; determinism §13.1 contract pinned by 100-iter round-trip test. New conditions_eval.rs (~600 LoC) — EvalContext borrows (HydratedSubject, ActionEnvelope, EnrichmentSnapshot, ClockSnapshot); pub fn evaluate(&Condition, &EvalContext) -> Result<bool, ConditionEvalError>; AND short-circuits on first false; target.<subpath> resolves against envelope.request.target serde_json::Value. PolicyError +2 variants. lib.rs re-exports. Tests: 16 module-level + 41 integration (26 parser + 15 eval). All 4 gates PASS. Scope guard: pipeline.rs / kernel.rs / precedence.rs / hard_deny.rs / hard_deny_engine.rs / constraints.rs / subject.rs UNTOUCHED.

completed.title: aios-policy v0.1.0 — emergency override boundary + RollbackBundle RPC + §22 acceptance fixtures (M3 CLOSER)
completed.evidence: 599 tests workspace (+44 over T-024 baseline 555). New crates/aios-policy/src/override_boundary.rs (~430 LoC, 9 inline tests): EmergencyOverride receipt + OverrideRequest input + OverrideScope (rule_id, action non-empty, optional subjects[]) + OverrideError typed enum (HardDenyCannotBeOverridden / HumanOnly / TtlExceeded / TtlZero / ScopeInvalid) + OverrideBoundary (Arc<RwLock<HashMap<String, EmergencyOverride>>>). request_override / request_override_at / is_overridden / revoke / invalidate_for_bundle_flip / prune_expired. MAX_OVERRIDE_TTL_SECONDS = 24*60*60 (§16.3). §16.2 enforced: hard-deny classes (incl. the two recovery-mode-overridable rows) rejected at grant time. §16.3 enforced: human-only, 24h TTL cap, scope must identify an action. Pipeline step 5 wired via new DecisionPipeline::step_5_emergency_override_with_boundary + new public driver entry evaluate_with_chain_full(envelope, original_ctx, hydrated_ctx, engine, boundary); old evaluate_with_chain becomes a thin wrapper passing boundary=None (T-017..T-024 baseline preserved). On override match: Decision::Allow + reason_code=EmergencyOverrideRelaxed + reason_message contains override_id+granted_by+reason for evidence linkage. Kernel InMemoryPolicyKernel +3 fields: rollback_stack (Arc<RwLock<Vec<PolicyBundle>>>) + rollback_capacity (default 8 = DEFAULT_ROLLBACK_STACK_CAPACITY) + override_boundary (Option<Arc<OverrideBoundary>>). set_active_bundle now pushes displaced bundle (ring-buffers at cap) + invalidates active grants per §16.3. New rollback_active_bundle() pops stack, swaps active pointer, clears overrides. with_rollback_capacity / with_override_boundary / override_boundary_handle / rollback_stack_depth/capacity. evaluate_policy uses evaluate_with_chain_full with boundary attached. RollbackBundle RPC wired in src/service/server.rs (last Unimplemented stub eliminated): requires new_in_memory ctor (otherwise Unimplemented); empty stack → failed_precondition; mismatched target_bundle_version → failed_precondition with best-effort restore; on success swaps service version pointer + cache.invalidate_for_bundle(prev_version) + mints evr_rb_<ULID> evidence receipt. aios-policy Cargo.toml 0.0.1 → 0.1.0 (M3 closure marker). DEFAULT_CODE_VERSION constant 0.0.1-T023 → 0.1.0-T025. lib.rs re-exports EmergencyOverride, OverrideBoundary, OverrideError, OverrideRequest, OverrideScope, MAX_OVERRIDE_TTL_SECONDS. Tests: 11 tests/override_boundary.rs + 11 tests/acceptance_fixtures.rs (covers §22.1–§22.10, with §22.9 split into 9a + 9b sub-fixtures) + 6 tests/rollback_bundle.rs + 6 tests/m3_closure.rs + 10 inline override_boundary module = +44 net. Spec deviations: brief assumed all §22 fixtures wire end-to-end through scoped-allow rule matching; §22.1 / §22.6 / §22.7 / §22.8 / §22.10 exercise paths still partially stubbed in the M3 pipeline (scoped-allow rule index, subject-group cycle detection, degraded-mode operator flag, per-evaluation budget enforcement, hot-reload in-flight version pinning). TRUST SPEC applied — each fixture asserted at the level the M3 pipeline can presently demonstrate (the constitutional contract under test) and the M4+ continuation points documented in inline test comments. All gates PASS: cargo check + cargo test --workspace (599 PASS) + cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings + cargo fmt --all -- --check + cargo bench -p aios-policy --no-run. Scope guard held: hard_deny_engine.rs / conditions*.rs / constraints.rs / bundle.rs / bundle_loader.rs / subject_hydration.rs / subject.rs / decision.rs / error.rs / precedence.rs / hard_deny.rs / snapshot.rs / cache.rs / explain.rs ALL UNTOUCHED. Pipeline modification limited to step 5 + the new driver entry threading the boundary. M3 closed honestly: T-016..T-025 = 10 tasks complete, no debt carried into M4.

completed.title: aios-capability-runtime v0.0.1 skeleton — S10.1 §3.1 FSM types + §3.2/§3.5/§3.7 enums + §10.1 AdapterManifest (M4 OPENER)
completed.evidence: 613 tests workspace (+14 over T-025 baseline 599). New crate crates/aios-capability-runtime v0.0.1 registered in workspace members (root Cargo.toml). Cargo.toml deps: aios-action (path) + serde + serde_json + thiserror + chrono + strum + strum_macros + ulid (workspace pins). Modules: lib.rs (#![forbid(unsafe_code)] + module decls + re-exports) + status.rs (ActionLifecycleState 14-variant FSM per §3.1: Created, PolicyPending, ApprovalPending, OverridePending, Approved, PolicyDenied, OverrideDenied, Queued, Executing, Verifying, Succeeded, Failed, RolledBack, RollbackFailed. SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE serde wire form. EnumIter + EnumCount. is_terminal() const fn returns true for the 4 strict terminals per §4.2 forbidden-transition table: Succeeded, RolledBack, RollbackFailed, OverrideDenied — POLICY_DENIED + FAILED deliberately not terminal because §4.2 T21 + T19/T20 allow exits) + dispatch.rs (4 closed enums per §3.2/§3.3/§3.4/§3.5: ActionDispatchKind 4-variant {InProcessRpc, SubprocessFork, IsolatedSandbox, DryRun} / AdapterIOMode 2-variant {TypedParametersOnly, TemplateParameters} / AdapterStability 5-variant {Registered, Experimental, Stable, Deprecated, Retired} / QueueClass 4-variant {Interactive, AgentProposal, Background, RecoveryPriority}, all SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE + EnumIter + EnumCount) + failure.rs (3 closed enums per §3.6/§3.7/§3.8: ExecutionFailureReason 12-variant / RollbackOutcome 4-variant {NotAttempted, Succeeded, Failed, NotApplicable} / RuntimeErrorCode 20-variant) + adapter_manifest.rs (AdapterManifest struct per §10.1 — NOTE: brief said '§4 AdapterManifest' but spec §4 is the FSM diagram + transition table; manifest schema lives at §10.1. TRUST SPEC applied. Fields: adapter_id, adapter_version, vendor, name, declared_stability, io_mode, dispatch_kind, declared_actions (Vec<AdapterActionDeclaration> nested struct with action_kind/target_schema/response_schema/rollback_strategy/timeout_seconds/template_string/template_substitution_variables), declared_invariants_supported, default_adapter_timeout_seconds, default_sandbox_profile_id, adapter_signature, signing_key_id, manifest_created_at, manifest_expires_at. #[serde(deny_unknown_fields)] on both) + context.rs (ActionContext struct: action_id (aios_action::ActionId), status (ActionLifecycleState), dispatch_kind, queue_class, created_at, last_updated_at, error: Option<ExecutionFailureReason>, rollback_outcome: Option<RollbackOutcome>, evidence_chain: Vec<String>; ActionContext::new const fn seeds Created/None/None/empty) + error.rs (RuntimeError thiserror taxonomy: ActionNotFound(ActionId), InvalidTransition{from, to}, AdapterUnknown(String), AdapterSignatureInvalid, ManifestInvalid(String), Internal(String); canonical English Display strings pinned in tests). Tests: 14 in tests/types_roundtrip.rs covering all 8 §3 enums round-trip with explicit wire-form spot checks, AdapterManifest + ActionContext serde JSON round-trip with deny_unknown_fields rejection check, RuntimeError canonical Display, ActionLifecycleState fourteen-state invariant via EnumCount + iterator count, strict-terminal classification for all 14 states, cross-crate aios_action::ActionEnvelope + ActionId import smoke test. All 4 gates PASS: cargo check --workspace + cargo test --workspace (613) + cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings + cargo fmt --all -- --check. Clippy fixes applied during gate sweep: 4 missing-backticks in doc comments (SemVer, hex_lower, subject_type, T-027 ref) + 1 missing-const-for-fn (ActionContext::new) + 1 doc-link clarification. tests/types_roundtrip.rs gained #![allow(clippy::expect_used, clippy::panic, clippy::no_effect_underscore_binding)] prelude matching aios-policy/tests/types_roundtrip.rs convention. Scope guard held: no CapabilityRuntime trait (T-027), no proto IDL / build.rs / gRPC (T-033), no adapter registry impl (T-028), no dispatch queue (T-029), no policy/evidence integration (T-030/T-031), no rollback driver (T-032). M4 next: T-027 CapabilityRuntime async trait + lifecycle pipeline driver (mirrors aios-policy T-017 pattern).
